近期因為有報導指出 Face ID 的數據可以被第三方廠商獲取，使不少用戶心中產生疑慮。然而 Phil Schiller 認為用戶們會有此疑慮是正常的，不過他也表示 Apple 在這方面已經下足了苦功：

有關於這些資料是如何使用的部分，我覺得我們已經非常努力地建立與客戶之間的信任關係。首先，沒有任何的 Face ID 數據可以被第三方廠商獲取。當你在使用 Face ID 進行登錄時，都會由 Secure Enclave 進行加密，第三方廠商不能透過 iPhone 的鏡頭來獲得你的 Face ID 數據。我們雖然有建立 API 讓開發者可以使用鏡頭來追蹤臉部動作，好讓使用者可以進行一些特別的操作，像是將虛擬的貼紙貼到臉上。但是這和 Face ID 是不同的，這些功能並沒有和 Face ID 擁有相同的權限。

iMac Pro comes with a special black Apple Lightning cable



Apple has just announced that the iMac Pro will be available to order from Thursday, December 14. The company gave a unit to Marques Brownlee for some pre-release impressions and it includes a couple new tidbits. MKBHD says that Apple is including a black Lightning cable with the iMac Pro, something that you can’t (yet?) buy separately.

This black Lightning cable complements the exclusive Space Gray Magic Keyboard, Magic Mouse and Magic Trackpad accessories which come with the iMac Pro (which all charge using Lightning ports).

To date, Apple has not offered black Lightning cables separately for sale. It’s a nice $5000 iMac perk, but hopefully they will start selling black Lightning cables as official accessories. For now, if you want a black cable for your black iPhone, you have to buy a third-party cable from an accessory manufacturer.

You shouldn’t have to own Apple’s most expensive Mac just to colour-match your shiny new iPhone X with its charging cable.

As pictured by Cabel Sasser, the black cable design even fills in the area around the pins with black paint.


Amusingly, the new black cable still flaunts a traditional USB-A connector so it may be exclusive, but it still does not adopt the USB-C connector, of which the iMac Pro features 4 such ports.

https://9to5mac.com/2017/12/12/imac-pro-black-lightning-cable/

軟件開發商Primate Labs創辦人普爾（John Poole），得悉使用老化電池的舊iPhone，速度比換了新電池的差後，蒐集了數千部iPhone的數據，發現使用分別在1月及本月上架的iOS10.2.1及11.2作業系統的iPhone 6S（圖），都出現上述情況；iPhone 7亦如是。然而，使用較舊10.2作業系統的iPhone 6S就無此問題。
蘋果接獲關於iPhone 6S在螢幕顯示仍有40%電量時關機的投訴後，推出iOS10.2.1補救。普爾相信，iOS10.2.1與前版10.2的分別，在於10.2.1會在手機電池老化、儲電量減至某水平時，拖慢手機處理器速度，以防手機因為電量不足而不消數小時就關機的狀況出現。
iPhone的離子鋰電池可供完全充電500次，換言之充電越頻密，電池就越快老化，iPhone亦會越快無電。蘋果未有回應。
